tests.detail: PASS: all 7 declared version targets coherent at 6.0.3-vmodel.13
PASS: runtime manifests point to oxydavid-maxx/superpowers

notes: Implemented S4_BUILD only. Did not edit spec/test-design/release/push files. Original build commits: bbef986 (fix) through 103eb7d (ack). Version bump commit 987b05d added per FORK-MAINTENANCE.md requirement: shipped content changes must call scripts/bump-version.sh to increment vmodel tag. The ack head_sha_after records the build commit (987b05d), not a self-referential ack-only commit — the ack update and build commit are the same commit here because the ack is part of the version release artifact.
